common.geminiApiKeyRequired: This app requires a GEMINI_API_KEY. Please configure it in the Integrations tab.

assetPicker.description: Choose assets from the workspace or upload new files.

onboarding.description: You are already logged in as the admin configured via environment. Set up your AI provider now. User management is handled exclusively through container environment variables.
onboarding.providerDescription: Choose your provider, set up authentication, and save the same PI configuration as you would later in Settings.
onboarding.setupCompleteDescription: Providers, models, and other agent settings can be adjusted anytime in Settings.

notebook.emptyStateTitle: Open a file or start directly in chat.
notebook.emptyStateDescription: The mobile notebook flow now starts in the editor. Select a file from the explorer or jump directly into the Canvas Chat.
notebook.protectedFoldersDeleteOnly: App output folders cannot be deleted.
notebook.deleteItemsConfirmWithSkipped: Delete {count} items? {skipped} protected app folder(s) will be skipped.
notebook.deleteItemsConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {count} items?
notebook.protectedFoldersSkipped: {count} protected app folder(s) were not deleted.
notebook.protectedFolderDelete: This app output folder cannot be deleted.
notebook.deleteSingleConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
notebook.protectedFolderRename: This app output folder cannot be renamed.
notebook.protectedFolderMove: This app output folder cannot be moved.
notebook.renameDescription: Enter a new name for the item. The new name will be saved in the same directory.
notebook.moveDescription: Select a new destination folder and optionally rename the item.
notebook.name: Name
notebook.moveIntoSelf: Cannot move a folder into itself.
notebook.binaryPreviewUnavailable: Binary file preview is not available.

chat.metadataDescription: Fullscreen chat app for the Canvas Notebook workspace.
chat.title: CANVAS CHAT
chat.deleteSessionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session?
chat.willSendAfterStop: Will send after the current chain stops.
chat.imageModelWarningBody: The current model does not support images. Attached images will be ignored.
chat.starterTitle: What should Canvas Chat prepare for you?
chat.starterDescription: Start with a template for campaigns, creatives, strategies, documents, or a better file organization.
chat.composerPlaceholderCompact: Ask about a project or files. Use @ to reference files.
chat.composerPlaceholderDefault: Ask about your project, marketing plan, or workspace. Use @ to reference files.
chat.composerHintBusyMobile: Your next message will be queued. More actions are available in quick actions.
chat.composerHintBusyDesktop: Send queues the message as a follow-up. Use Steer to interrupt after the current tool step, or Send now to stop the current chain first.
chat.composerHintIdle: Type @ for files or pick a quick action below.

sm-campaign.title: Visual social campaign
sm-campaign.description: Develop the concept, channel structure, and creative direction for a strong social media campaign.
sm-campaign.prompt: Help me develop a visual social media campaign for my business. Create a concept with a core idea, platform-specific formats, visual direction, hook variations, CTA approaches, and a compact editorial plan for the first two weeks.

ad-creatives.title: Plan ad creatives
ad-creatives.description: Prepare concrete image and copy ideas for multiple ad formats.
ad-creatives.prompt: Create several strong ad creatives for my offer. I need different angles, visual ideas, headline options, CTA variations, and clear suggestions for static ads, carousel ads, and short video ads.

video-production.title: Develop video ideas
video-production.description: Structure script, scenes, and production notes for marketing or product videos.
video-production.prompt: Help me develop a short marketing or product video. I want a concept with the goal, audience, storyline, shot list, voiceover, on-screen text, and a clear production flow for a video under 45 seconds.

business-strategy.title: Build a strategy
business-strategy.description: Break a business or marketing initiative into goals, priorities, and actions.
business-strategy.prompt: Work with me on a practical business or marketing strategy. I need a clear structure covering the target vision, positioning, audience, priorities, risks, actions for the next 30 days, and concrete next steps.

document-draft.title: Draft a document
document-draft.description: Build and structure a clean brief, proposal, or internal document.
document-draft.prompt: Help me create a professional document. I need a sensible structure, clear chapters, draft wording, and notes about what information is still missing so it can become, for example, a brief, proposal, or concept document.

workspace-organization.title: Organize files
workspace-organization.description: Set up a productive folder and file structure for projects, campaigns, or clients.
workspace-organization.prompt: Help me organize my files and project materials better. Create a sensible workspace structure with folder logic, file naming, storage for assets and documents, and simple rules so my team can work faster and spend less time searching.

hero.title: Choose an app and continue in the same workspace.
hero.description: All apps use the same workspace. New images, videos, and content are immediately available for the next step.

agentSetup.title: Agent Setup
agentSetup.runtimeUnavailable: Agent runtime config is currently unavailable.

help.title: Help & tutorials
help.description: Tutorials, guides, and help for setting up the Canvas Software Suite.

chatPrompt.title: Canvas Chat
chatPrompt.placeholder: Start with a business use case or adapt a template. Enter sends, @ references files.
chatPrompt.attachmentsHint: Attach images via upload or paste.

notebook.title: Canvas Notebook
notebook.description: Manage files, chat, editor, and terminal in the workspace.

usage.title: Usage Analytics
usage.description: Analyze token and cost usage by time range, model, session, and user.

imageGeneration.title: Image Generation
imageGeneration.description: Generate images and save them directly in the workspace.

nanoBanana.title: Nano Banana Localizer
nanoBanana.description: Localize existing ads linguistically for each target market.

automations.title: Automations
automations.description: Plan recurring agent jobs for the shared workspace.

skills.title: Skill Gallery
skills.description: Create, manage, and use skills in chat.

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.description: Workspace terminal for real nerds. No GUI, just pure command-line magic.

terminal.metadataDescription: Fullscreen terminal app for the Canvas Notebook workspace.
terminal.title: Terminal

integrations.title: Micro-SaaS Integrations
integrations.description: Keys for VEO, Nano Banana, and other micro-SaaS apps. Gemini-based apps can share the same GEMINI_API_KEY here.

agents.title: Agent Environment
agents.description: Keys and agent env values for OpenRouter, Ollama, and the agent runtime.

doctor.title: Doctor
doctor.description: System check for providers and connectivity.

files.title: Agent Managed Files
files.description: System-relevant markdown files for agent behavior.

provider.cardDescription: Configuration for the PI-based agent engine.
provider.customModelHelp: Enter the name of your custom model. Example: my-model:latest or llama3.1:8b
provider.visionLegendWithCustom: 👁️ = Vision-capable (supports images) | Choose "Custom Model" to use a model that is not listed
provider.standardLocalHelp: Default (local): Ollama runs on your computer at localhost:11434.
provider.remoteServerHelp: Remote server: connect to an external Ollama server on your network or in the cloud.
provider.remoteServerUrlHelp: Enter the URL of your Ollama server. Examples: http://192.168.1.100:11434 or https://ollama.your-server.com
provider.terminalConfigDescription: Open the terminal to pull models and start the server.
provider.authenticationMethodDescription: Choose how you want to authenticate with this provider:
provider.apiKeySetupDescription: Create the API key in the configuration section below and save it there.
provider.oauthAuthenticationDescription: Connect your account to use this provider. Your credentials are stored securely.
provider.systemInfoDescription: The engine uses API keys from the integrations settings. Model discovery happens via the PI registry.

errors.customModelName: Please enter a name for the custom Ollama model.
errors.remoteUrl: Please enter a remote server URL for Ollama.

providerEnv.saved: API key and provider saved successfully

skills.title: Skill Gallery
skills.metadataDescription: Browse and manage Canvas Notebook skills.

integrationsHint.label: Note:
integrationsHint.body: If skills require environment variables, they must be stored in the integrations tab.

creationHint.label: Create a new skill:
creationHint.bodyBefore: Tell the agent that you want to create a new skill. You can then work out together what the skill should do. Use the

emptyState.title: No Skills Found
emptyState.description: Skills will appear here once they are added to the /data/skills/ directory.

detail.srDescription: Details and documentation for the selected skill.

intro.prefix: Plan recurring agent jobs for the same workspace. Run artifacts are stored under
intro.suffix: , with business outputs optionally written to a dedicated target folder.

editor.description: Keep it non-technical. The agent will execute the task in the workspace later.

placeholders.name: Daily market check
placeholders.prompt: Describe the agent task in plain language...

output.title: Where should the results be stored?
output.description: Optional. If left empty, the automation automatically uses one target folder per job.

runs.title: Run history
runs.description: Status, results, and logs for the selected automation.

logs.title: Logs
logs.description: Raw event log for the selected execution.

auto.label: Automatic
auto.hint: The agent decides on its own which tools make sense.

qmd.label: Search workspace
qmd.hint: Focus on qmd workspace search with text and document index.

directoryPicker.title: Choose folder in workspace
directoryPicker.description: Choose an existing base folder in the workspace inspector. The tree starts collapsed by default.
directoryPicker.helpLineOne: Only folders inside the workspace can be selected.
directoryPicker.helpLineTwo: If you do not set your own path, the automation automatically uses its default folder.

imageGeneration.title: Image Generation
imageGeneration.cardDescription: Generate up to {count} image variations with a prompt and optional reference images. Output is saved under
imageGeneration.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate...

currentResults.title: Current Results
currentResults.description: Results from the latest generation run.
currentResults.empty: No generation in this session yet.

savedOutputs.title: generations
savedOutputs.description: Most recently saved images from the workspace.

bestQuality.label: 🎨 Best Quality & Features
bestQuality.description: Latest model with the highest quality and more capabilities. Supports up to 14 reference images and advanced features like grounding. Best for professional results.

fastAffordable.label: ⚡ Fast & Affordable
fastAffordable.description: Faster generation at lower cost. Supports up to 3 reference images. Great for quick drafts, simple visuals, and faster iteration.

skincareProductShot.label: Skincare Product Shot
skincareProductShot.prompt: Premium product shot of a minimalist skincare bottle on a marble pedestal, soft studio lighting, clean luxury branding

travelCampaign.label: Travel Campaign
travelCampaign.prompt: Instagram ad creative for a summer travel campaign, bold typography, vibrant tropical colors, modern marketing style

techHeroBanner.label: Tech Hero Banner
techHeroBanner.prompt: Hero banner scene for a SaaS landing page, abstract 3D shapes, professional corporate palette, high-end tech aesthetic

foodCampaign.label: Food Campaign
foodCampaign.prompt: Food campaign visual with dramatic lighting, gourmet burger and fries, high-contrast commercial photography look

fashionEditorial.label: Fashion Editorial
fashionEditorial.prompt: Fashion e-commerce editorial: streetwear model in an urban setting, cinematic lighting, high-detail fabric textures

beforeAfter.label: Before & After
beforeAfter.prompt: Before-and-after style concept image for a home cleaning brand, split composition, bright and trustworthy tone
